requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Zambia's EV charging infrastructure, in its nascent stage of development, is adopting the international IEC 62196 connector ecosystem consistent with the country's IEC-aligned standards direction under ZABS (Zambia Bureau of Standards, which adopts IEC standards as Zambia Standards). AC charging uses the IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) coupler; DC fast charging uses the Combined Charging System Combo 2 (CCS2), defined in IEC 62196-3 configuration FF. Because Zambia's EV market is very nascent, connector infrastructure is limited, but the internationally interoperable Type 2 / CCS2 direction is the correct technical trajectory for equipment deployed in Zambia. Deploying GB/T-connector chargers creates a stranded-asset risk as vehicle fleets transition to IEC 62196-compatible models imported from international markets. ZABS conformity and ERB licensing for installations involving electrical couplers reference IEC standards.
summary.zh: 赞比亚电动汽车充电基础设施正处于发展初期，按照ZABS（赞比亚标准局，采用IEC标准作为赞比亚标准）的IEC标准方向，采用IEC 62196接口体系。交流充电使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器；直流快充使用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定义的联合充电系统Combo 2（CCS2）。由于赞比亚电动汽车市场非常新兴，接口基础设施有限，但面向赞比亚部署设备的正确技术方向是国际通用的Type 2 / CCS2路线。部署GB/T接口充电桩在进口自国际市场的IEC 62196兼容车辆逐步普及时将面临资产搁浅风险。涉及电气耦合器的安装，ZABS合格评定和ERB许可均参照IEC标准。
summary.zht: 尚比亞電動汽車充電基礎設施正處於發展初期，按照ZABS（尚比亞標準局，採用IEC標準作為尚比亞標準）的IEC標準方向，採用IEC 62196接口體系。交流充電使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器；直流快充使用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定義的聯合充電系統Combo 2（CCS2）。由於尚比亞電動汽車市場非常新興，接口基礎設施有限，但面向尚比亞部署設備的正確技術方向是國際通用的Type 2 / CCS2路線。部署GB/T接口充電樁在進口自國際市場的IEC 62196兼容車輛逐步普及時將面臨資產擱淺風險。涉及電氣耦合器的安裝，ZABS合格評定和ERB許可均參照IEC標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
ZABS (Zambia Bureau of Standards) conformity requirements adopting IEC standards (zabs.org.zm)

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. Although the GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler has a similar overall shape to the IEC 62196 Type 2, they differ in connector gender (GB/T uses male connector at the charger and female vehicle inlet, opposite to Type 2), signaling protocol (CC/CP versus PP/CP), and contact arrangement, making them physically and electrically incompatible. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are geometrically different from CCS2 and use a nine-pin configuration with CAN bus via GB/T 27930 communication, incompatible with the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 communication stack. Most EVs entering Zambia are imported from international (non-China-domestic) markets and carry IEC 62196-compatible vehicle inlets, making GB/T chargers immediately unusable for the existing and incoming Zambia vehicle fleet.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形与IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但两者在接口性别（GB/T充电桩端为公口、车辆端为母口，与Type 2相反）、信号协议（CC/CP与PP/CP）及触点排列上均不同，在物理和电气层面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2在几何形状上不同，采用九针配置并通过GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，与CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通信栈不兼容。进入赞比亚市场的大多数电动汽车来自国际（非中国国内）市场，配备IEC 62196兼容车辆接口，这使GB/T充电桩对赞比亚现有及即将引入的车辆立即无法使用。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形與IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但兩者在接口性別（GB/T充電樁端為公口、車輛端為母口，與Type 2相反）、信號協議（CC/CP與PP/CP）及觸點排列上均不同，在物理和電氣層面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2在幾何形狀上不同，採用九針配置並通過GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，與CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通訊棧不兼容。進入尚比亞市場的大多數電動汽車來自國際（非中國國內）市場，配備IEC 62196兼容車輛接口，這使GB/T充電樁對尚比亞現有及即將引入的車輛立即無法使用。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 Zambia deployments and cannot serve vehicles with IEC 62196-compatible inlets. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack (from GB/T 27930 CAN to IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 where required), labels, test reports, and temperature-rise evidence. Adapters are not an accepted substitute for project-compliant connector design. Given Zambia's nascent market and the dominance of internationally imported vehicles, deploying IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connectors from the outset is the only practical strategy.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于赞比亚IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2部署，且无法为配备IEC 62196兼容接口的车辆提供充电服务。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈（在要求时从GB/T 27930 CAN转换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、标签、测试报告及温升证据进行硬件重新设计。转接器不是项目合规接口设计的替代方案。鉴于赞比亚市场的新兴性质和国际进口车辆的主导地位，从一开始就部署IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口是唯一切实可行的策略。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於尚比亞IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2部署，且無法為配備IEC 62196兼容接口的車輛提供充電服務。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧（在要求時從GB/T 27930 CAN轉換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、標籤、測試報告及溫升證據進行硬體重新設計。轉接器不是項目合規接口設計的替代方案。鑑於尚比亞市場的新興性質和國際進口車輛的主導地位，從一開始就部署IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口是唯一切實可行的策略。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for interoperability — IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is the connector standard aligned with ZABS IEC adoption and required for compatibility with internationally imported vehicles in Zambia; physical incompatibility with GB/T makes substitution impossible without hardware redesign
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute; GB/T connectors cannot interface with vehicles carrying IEC 62196 inlets

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. For Zambia deployments, IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC are the correct connectors. GB/T connectors cannot be plugged into IEC 62196 vehicle inlets and vice versa — this is a day-one operational gap, not a future risk.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。在赞比亚部署时，交流应采用IEC 62196 Type 2，直流应采用CCS2。GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196车辆接口，反之亦然——这是第一天即存在的运营差距，而非未来风险。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。在尚比亞部署時，交流應採用IEC 62196 Type 2，直流應採用CCS2。GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196車輛接口，反之亦然——這是第一天即存在的運營差距，而非未來風險。
